title: geraniospermum ceratophyllum
intro: Geraniospermum ceratophyllum, also known as the hornwort plant, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Anthocerotaceae. Traditionally, the hornwort plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Geraniospermum ceratophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
intro_study: According to "European review for medical and pharmacological sciences", geraniospermum ceratophyllum (also known as Geranium species) has been shown to have significant antioxidant and antimicrobial benefits due to its high content of polyphenols and hydrolyzable tannins.
